# Stopwatch.lol

> Free online stopwatch and timer tools with millisecond precision, lap counter,
> and split times. No signup, works offline, runs accurately in the background.
> Built as a fast, privacy-friendly web app (browser Performance API timing).

## Core tools
- [Online Stopwatch](https://stopwatch.lol/): Millisecond-precision stopwatch with unlimited laps and split times.
- [Countdown Timer](https://stopwatch.lol/countdown): Countdown timer with sound for cooking, workouts, exams, presentations, and Pomodoro.
- [Full Screen Stopwatch](https://stopwatch.lol/full-screen-stopwatch): Large full-screen timer for classrooms, coaching, and events. Keyboard shortcuts: Space (start/stop), L (lap), R (reset).

## Games
- [Free Online Games](https://stopwatch.lol/games): Tic Tac Toe, Number Guesser, Rock Paper Scissors — play free in the browser.

## Content
- [Blog](https://stopwatch.lol/blog): Guides on timing, productivity, sports performance, and the FIFA World Cup 2026.

## Key facts
- Timing accuracy: uses the browser high-resolution Performance API (performance.now()) for sub-millisecond precision.
- Cost: completely free, no registration, no downloads.
- Offline: works without an internet connection once loaded.
- Devices: responsive on desktop, tablet, and mobile.
